observations.summary: The scream in the source paragraph is paralleled by a soundless scream in chapter 1, both representing intense internal or external anguish.

source_evidence.quote: The scream tore through the pre-dawn stillness like a knife through old cloth.

target_evidence.quote: His hands grasped at gold, copper, and fine silver; the noise of his hidden greed was a soundless scream in the dream.
